title: Identify Person from Colum "E-Mailadress" - Forms

posts.author: ChrSchmittHE (Heiligenfeld Kliniken GmbH Christian Schmitt)
posts.cookedHtml: We looking forward for a solution how can we match the field “e-mailadress” in Workforms Field to an existing User in Monday in the spefic “person” column in the board? actually we are not able to send the creator from the workform (in our case "e-mailadress) into the the “person” field in the board.
